results.title: 1st ODI: Axar Patel picks career-best 4-62 as India restrict England to 258
results.description: Birmingham, July 14 (IANS) All-rounder Axar Patel brought out his career-best performance of 4-62 as Joe Root was left stranded on the other end at 76 to guide England to 258 all out in 47.5 overs in the first ODI against India at the Edgbaston Stadium in Birmingham on Tuesday. England bounced back from a ...

results.title: More than 50 cases of 'explosive' diarrhea parasite in Oklahoma in 2026
results.description: Newly released data from the Oklahoma State Department of Health shows dozens in the Sooner State have been infected with a parasitic illness known to cause what health officials call “explosive” diarrhea.

results.title: Cardinal Chorale announces free July concert series at Muskingum University
results.description: The Cardinal Chorale will present four free public concerts July 19-25 at Muskingum University, featuring choral music, the Gem Tones, Helen Welch and the premiere of “One World, One Voice, One Song.” Donations will support the group’s youth music mission.

results.title: An experimental Alzheimer's drug shows some promise as researchers hunt new approaches
results.description: An experimental drug might help slow early Alzheimer’s disease in a markedly different way than today’s treatments — by lowering levels of a brain protein called tau, researchers reported Tuesday.

results.title: Russia plans to take Baltics to International Court of Justice over alleged discrimination
results.description: Russia has announced plans to take the Baltic states to the International Court of Justice, accusing them of discriminating against ethnic Russians, in what would likely become Estonia's most expensive court case to date, Baltic investigative journalists have found.

results.title: Shelby Senior Center News (July 15, 2026)
results.description: Shelby Senior Center, 739 Benton Avenue, is open to the public for lunch Monday through Friday at noon. The suggested cost price is $6 for ages 60 and over, and under the age of 60 the price is $7. Meal tickets can be bought in advance for $60 for 10 meals, or $70, depending on age. Please phone (406-434-2992) to let us know you are joining us. We ask you to make reservations or cancellations by...

results.description: Darline Graham became South Carolina’s first female senator.

results.title: Two charged after stolen Corvette from Landers found at chop shop
results.description: Two men are facing charges after a Corvette reported stolen from a Landers was found at a chop shop in Frayser.

results.title: Elephant Fire continues to burn: 12,303 acres, 5% contained
results.description: (FOX40.COM) — The Elephant Fire continues to grow, burning up to 12,303 acres and remaining only 5% contained, according to Cal Fire. The fire began on Saturday, right before 3 p.m., North of Loyalton and Highway 49. According to Cal Fire, the fire burned 2,300 acres before increasing to 6,436 acres on Sunday, then 12,303 acres [...]

results.title: India’s IDBI Bank Sale Gets Fresh Bids
Dilip Joshi Remains a Key Player in Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Amid Rumors
results.description: The popular sitcom Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is set to celebrate its 18th anniversary, but recent rumors about Dilip Joshi's departure have sparked concern among fans. The show's producers have clarified that Joshi will continue to play Jethalal, assuring viewers that the upcoming storylines will still focus on his character. Over the years, many actors have left the show for various reasons, but Joshi's long-standing presence remains a cornerstone of this beloved series. Discover more about the show's history and cast changes in the full article.

results.title: India Post Achieves Record Business Growth in Q1 2026-27
results.description: In a recent meeting, Union Minister Jyotiraditya Scindia announced that India Post has achieved a record revenue of ₹4,008.95 crore in the first quarter of the financial year 2026-27. This marks a remarkable 22.2% increase compared to the previous year, highlighting the department's transformation into a modern, citizen-centric organization. The minister outlined strategic priorities for the upcoming quarters, focusing on logistics, new business opportunities, and enhancing citizen services. This achievement is seen as a testament to the dedication of postal employees and the trust placed in India Post by millions of citizens. Discover more about the future plans and growth strategies of India Post in the full article.

results.title: Graduates From These Colleges Struggle Most With Student Loan Repayments
results.description: The now-shuttered Florida Career College has the highest number of borrowers behind on their federal student loans. Find out which others made the list.
